_doc: Cross-system maestro tree (pilot). Proves deterministic parent->child->domain traversal: a stuck ProcessOrchestration job (symptom) -> Maestro instance incident 170002 (symptom, raised BY a child fault) -> child UI Automation NodeNotFoundException -> dispatch to UIA leaf. Symptom nodes are FORBIDDEN as terminal (mandatory goto into the child). Branches are on structured tokens (RuntimeType/State enums, errorCode, exception FQN) - the deterministic-extractable kind; the exact selector correction is the LLM/source last mile. job_key IS the Maestro instance key (documented cross-product correlation).

branch_stuck._note: stuck ProcessOrchestration parent = SYMPTOM, not terminal -> traverse to the Maestro instance (job_key == instance_key)

branch_incident._note: incident 170002 = 'Failure in the Orchestrator Job', raised BY the child fault. SYMPTOM, forbidden terminal -> dispatch on the child exception.

dispatch_child._note: cross-domain dispatch on the child exception FQN package - same mechanism a top-level prompt uses to route to a domain subtree

leaf_uia_selector.cause: Root cause is in the CHILD automation, not the stuck parent: a UI Automation strict-selector mismatch (NodeNotFoundException) faulted the child RPA job; with no BPMN boundary error event the Maestro instance hung, leaving the parent ProcessOrchestration job Running.
leaf_uia_selector.fix: Correct the failing activity's selector, and add an error boundary event on the BPMN service task so a child fault can't hang the instance.
leaf_uia_selector.last_mile_llm: The EXACT selector correction (which attribute/value, e.g. aaname 'set' -> 'Collaboration') requires reading the child .xaml against the live element — an LLM/source step, NOT a deterministic branch.

leaf_is_handoff.cause: Child fault is an Integration Service exception.
leaf_is_handoff.fix: Dispatch to the IS subtree on the child exception.

leaf_excel_handoff.cause: Child fault is an Excel exception.
leaf_excel_handoff.fix: Dispatch to the Excel subtree on the child exception.

llm_signature.reason: Evidence did not match a deterministic branch — hand to the LLM hypothesis loop seeded with the trace.

llm_identity.reason: Could not resolve the entity deterministically — LLM resolves identity (possibly asking the user), then re-enters the tree.
